title: Neurobiology: Crowdsourcing CO<sub>2</sub> to Conserve Brain Energy.
author_string: St John Smith, Ewan, Park, Thomas J
abstract: Naked mole-rats are adapted to living in a low-oxygen and high-CO<sub>2</sub> environment. Elevated environmental CO<sub>2</sub> inhibits brain activity and has acted as a selection pressure to reduce GABAergic tone, which in turn reduces energetic needs in a hypoxic habitat.
